reading: homogeneous-control = stochastic floor (same model+evidence+protocol -> n_eff~=1). clean-diverse isolates model-tier + protocol independence with evidence held FULL. heterogeneous additionally varies the evidence partition. Per the adversarial audit (assessment/AUDIT.json) the clean-diverse -> heterogeneous gap is driven mainly by evidence-partition starvation, not independent competence; the honest effective-independence estimate on the HSM crux is ~1-2 votes, not k.
